focus: Q1 — Quality rubric for code work

label: Review rubric structure transfers cleanly to coder acceptance rubric
Verification evidence needs a dedicated coder scoring dimension
Stack-pattern compliance is separate but must remain sk-code-owned
Security/correctness minimums are hard gates inside coder correctness and integration
Scope-adherence deserves coder-side scoring weight due to LEAF write-safety risk
Suggested distribution is valid with explicit P0/P1 override semantics
